health: Upload your holdings to get started.
summary: This is a sample dashboard with placeholder data. Use the Upload button to drop your own Wealthsimple holdings CSV — your data is stored only on this device. Then generate personalized recommendations.

recommendations.title: Add your data
recommendations.detail: Click Upload and drop your Wealthsimple holdings-report CSV. Nothing leaves your device.

disclaimer: Educational only, not licensed financial advice. Sample data — not real holdings.
